response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song '常夜リペイント' from on-screen text. Performed a web search for the song title and confirmed the performer is 'Secret Society holoX'. Used the found lyrics from standard lyric databases.
response.global_summary: A performance of the song 'Joya Repaint' by the Hololive group 'Secret Society holoX' (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, Sakamata Chloe, Kazama Iroha).

scenes.description: The Hololive group 'Secret Society holoX' performs the song 'Joya Repaint' on stage. The song title '常夜リペイント' is displayed in the bottom-left corner.
scenes.performer_in_video: Secret Society holoX (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, Sakamata Chloe, Kazama Iroha)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
「そこに跪け！」
「吐いて捨てるような現実を」
「一刀両断叩き斬る」
「終わりなき輪廻に迷いし子らよ」
「漆黒の翼で誘おう」
「我らエデンの星を統べる者、秘密結社・・・ holoX！！」
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
"Kneel before me!"
"Cut through the reality that seems like something you'd spit out"
"Slashing through with a single stroke"
"Children who are lost in the endless reincarnation"
"Let's invite them with jet-black wings"
"We are those who rule the star of Eden, Secret Society... holoX!!"

scenes.start: 00:27.000}],"step_by_step_log": "Identified the song '常夜リペイント' from on-screen text. Performed a web search for the song title and confirmed the performer is 'Secret Society holoX'. Used the found lyrics from standard lyric databases."}
